differentiatorNote: Real-Time FX Swap Pools Using Gateway: single PoolManager.swap() tx, Gateway mints USDC inside beforeSwap, ZERO Iris attestation polling. This is the PR-H8 differentiator over CCTP-only flows.

steps.stubReason: Pending fx-telarana#33 deploy + setPoolGatewayRoute(poolId, routeId) call

steps.detail: By design, this demo skips the Fuji burn → Iris poll → Arc receiveMessage leg entirely. The whole point of Gateway intra-hook liquidity is that the USDC materialises atomically inside `beforeSwap`. K2 (scripts/v4-swap-pool-demo-cctp.ts) shows the CCTP comparator.
V4_SWAP_DRY_RUN=true (default). Pass V4_SWAP_DRY_RUN=false plus V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_ATTESTATION + V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_SIGNATURE to actually broadcast.
